title: A multistory deck restoration
summary: After the homeowner decided to restore a multistory deck decaying and dulling from water and sun exposure, Artisanal Restoration removed the aging surface, reframed the rotting underlying structural framework, added shims and furring strips to ensure a level deck surface, and installed new decking coordinated to match the existing brick siding.
featuredImageAlt: A second-story view of a deck restored by Artisanal Restoration
